claims.claim: The codec maps felt emotional/intent markers to dims 24-31 and narrative arc to dims 40-43 in a deterministic 48D semantic lane.
Narrative motion can be flattened when emotional marker slots remain static, hiding process in post-hoc structure.
Dynamic gain pressure cross-reference and entropy writes into reserved dims 44-47 would change live codec/gain/vector authority.
evidence: authority_gate:Tier 5 Mike/operator approval required before live codec gain, vector-width, ceiling, or reserved-dim changes
